Generated Narrative: ValueSet ch-emr-cognitive-disability-types-vs

This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include codes fromhttp://snomed.info/sct version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a 386806002 (Impaired cognition (finding))
  • Include codes fromhttp://snomed.info/sct version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a 228156007 (Intellectual functioning disability)
  • Include codes fromhttp://snomed.info/sct version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a 110351007 (Psychiatric behavioral disability)
  • Include codes fromhttp://snomed.info/sct version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a 280965007 (Behavioral disability)
  • Include codes fromhttp://snomed.info/sct version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a 47437004 (Mental handicap)
  • Include codes fromhttp://snomed.info/sct version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a 443656000 (Developmentally disabled (finding))
  • Include codes fromhttp://snomed.info/sct version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a 52448006 (Dementia)

name: ChEmrCognitiveDisabilityTypesVS
title: Cognitive disability types
description: Value set for the types of cognitive disabilities based on SNOMED CT.
